sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_series (id Int32, series Array(Float64));
SELECT id, seriesOutliersDetectTukey(series) AS anomalies FROM test_series;
UPDATE test_series SET series = arrayJoin(series) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, seriesOutliersDetectTukey(series, 0.2, 0.8, 2.0) AS anomalies_with_params FROM test_series;
